reviews.review_description:
Very good for practice . Am dreaming to play, one day, more than situations. But for a train exercices are well thinking.

Please creat more exercices. We need video
 tuto for some  exercices, because some time we Don t know what to do for win.

It’s awesome you don’t need chairs and cones anymore because this game is better than that anyway. It has holograms that look like real people that actually move and help you make decisions. It will  improve your decision making super quick. Who ever made this game is brilliant.

Overall rating 2000/10
